title: Turning Slack Messages into Monday Items
excerpt:
When you turn a Slack message into a Monday item - How can you make sure it brings over the links and attachments? 
If this isn’t possible, does anyone know a workaround? 
Or can this be a feature added in the future?

posts.author: MarigoldsInMay (Darielle Shandler)
posts.cookedHtml:
When you turn a Slack message into a Monday item - How can you make sure it brings over the links and attachments?
If this isn’t possible, does anyone know a workaround?
Or can this be a feature added in the future?

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MarigoldsInMay, we’ve recently launched an app called Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com that let’s you achieve exactly this (and much more).

Could I request you to please give it a try? Kindly let me know if you need any assistance getting set-up. Thanks
